body:
Update configurations for weatherquest runs. Add functionality for running Coupler through ERA5 historical period.

Includes options for: 
1.  running bucket with prescribed ERA5 albedo
2. running integrated land with MODIS climatology (to run coupler before 2010)
3. initializing sea ice with ERA5 surface ice temperatures
title: wxquest v3

body:
As the first step towards https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/issues/1691, this PR adds `CalibrateTools` as a module in ClimaCoupler and implements a `ERA5DataLoader` struct for loading preprocessed ERA5 data as `OutputVar`s. 

The module is not an extension, because the dependencies for this module are already strong dependencies for ClimaCoupler.
title: Add CalibrateTools and refactor generating observations

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
We already take `float(t)` when we timestep the ocean and sea ice, so this should work.

`use_itime = false` is now exercised only in one simulation, just so we continue supporting Float64. I'm not sure we really need to support it but I left it for now.

closes #1569
